title: Add detailed Tickflow lifecycle status messages
description: Emit and render detailed Tickflow lifecycle status events in the TUI/dashboard: worktree planning/creation/reuse/protection/provisioning, lease acquisition/release, tick launch, verifier start/end, merge start/success/conflict, tick close/handoff/escalation, and worktree teardown/preservation.
acceptance_criteria: During a Tickflow run, the TUI/status widget shows human-readable lifecycle messages for worktree establishment and teardown, tick start/completion, verifier and merge phases, and awaiting-human transitions. Messages are also represented in persisted run state or recent event history so /tickflow-dashboard can show them after interruption.
